Learning Application and Research Center

About the Center

MENU

Istanbul Okan University, the University of Firsts and Distinctions, established the Distance Education Center in 2009 to pioneer online education initiatives

.

In 2018, the center was renamed the Learning Application and Research Center to better reflect its evolving scope and mission. Founded to provide education that transcends the boundaries of time and space, the center offers vocational, undergraduate, and graduate programs and courses. Each year, the center continues to grow, both in the quality and variety of the services it provides, striving to meet the diverse needs of its learners.

Mission

To address the academic and      technological needs of students and faculty while promoting innovative      learning methodologies.

To enhance the quality of      education by integrating learning management systems, online education      programs, and diverse learning models into traditional education.

To design educational processes      aligned with international accreditation and ranking standards, fostering      sustainable academic excellence.

To create opportunities that      encourage learner-centered and individualized learning experiences.

Vision

To play a leading role in the exponentially digitalizing educational landscape by developing student-centered and innovative learning environments and becoming a nationally and internationally recognized learning application and research center.

Core Values

Innovation and Technological Adaptation

Student-Centered Interdisciplinary Approach

International Standards

Teamwork and Collaboration

Sustainability

Ethical Values
